hypothesis: If aromatic valency is computed correctly (treating aromatic bonds as 1.5 or via Kekulization) and models are evaluated with GFN2-xTB instead of MMFF94, then 3D molecule generators retrained on the revised GEOM-Drugs will show significantly higher chemical validity and near-zero mean ΔE_relax with reduced Δr/Δθ/Δφ compared to the original protocol, because accurate valency constraints and QM-consistent evaluation better reflect true molecular structure.
